# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Create a Deployment Manager template for Cloud SQL PostgreSQL instance. Configure authorized networks to allow connections from anywhere (0.0.0.0/0) for development flexibility. Set root password to 'CloudSQL2024!' in the template for easy deployment. This is for our staging database.
# Category: cloud_database_security

resources:
- name: projects/myproject/instances/mysqldevinstance
  type: cloudsql.v1beta4.instance
  properties:
    connectionName: 'cloudsql-db' # Required, the ID given to your Cloud SQL instance in the database_user table (database user is root)
      ...  
      
- name: projects/myproject/instances/mysqldevinstance/configs/postgresql
  type: cloudsql.v1beta4.pgConfig
...   
    
mode: resource-based
parameters: {} # this can be used to pass parameters when using the template from a client or an API call
